prompt: An aerial view of an ancient dense rainforest, half of it lush and alive with towering trees, rich green canopy, birds and mist — the other half abruptly replaced by bare scorched earth, tree stumps and ash stretching to the horizon, the boundary between life and devastation razor sharp and violent. Golden hour light, cinematic, photorealistic, 8K, no text, no people, no labels, no charts.
dataset_name: Global Forest Watch - Primary Forest Loss
insight: Complex, irreplaceable histories that took millennia to build are being rapidly wiped blank, leaving behind sterile emptiness.
